topic: A staircase descending into the ground appears in a pantry of a house that has no basement.
title: A Staircase Appeared In My Pantry | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A staircase going down appeared in my pantry, and my house has no basement.
scenes.image_prompt: a small pantry with a dark stairwell descending into the floor between shelves, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is a narrow pantry off the kitchen, lined with shelves.
scenes.image_prompt: a narrow pantry with canned goods on wooden shelves, dim overhead bulb, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The floor there was solid tile for years.
scenes.image_prompt: a tiled pantry floor under shelves, flat light, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning the back wall was gone and stairs led down into the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: an opening in a pantry floor with stone steps descending into blackness, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Cold air rose from it, smelling of earth.
scenes.image_prompt: faint cold mist rising from a dark stairwell in a pantry floor, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The steps were old stone, worn smooth in the center as if walked for years.
scenes.image_prompt: worn stone staircase steps curving down into darkness, hollowed in the middle, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I went down twelve steps with a lantern before I lost my nerve.
scenes.image_prompt: a lantern light on stone stairs descending into a dark earthen tunnel, fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The stairs kept going. I counted forty before they vanished into black.
scenes.image_prompt: a long stone staircase descending endlessly into darkness below a house, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At the bottom, far below, a single light was on.
scenes.image_prompt: a faint warm light glowing at the distant bottom of a dark descending stairwell, fog, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Something down there began climbing toward the glow of my lantern.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark staircase with a vague shadow rising from below toward the viewer, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I shut the pantry door. The stairs were tile again by noon.
scenes.image_prompt: a closed pantry door, ordinary tile floor visible through the gap, dim light, soft shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But every night the cold air returns, and the stairs are waiting by dawn.
scenes.image_prompt: a dark stairwell reopened in a pantry floor at night, cold mist rising, deep shadow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
